body:
This PR replaces the static “Season ends in” text in the Lobby page with a real countdown timer.
Changes include:
- Add live countdown timer logic to the Lobby page
- Use fixed target date: 2026-06-10T00:00:00Z
- Dynamically calculate remaining days / hours / minutes
- Update countdown automatically every minute
- Display “Season Ended” after expiration
- Preserve existing UI layout and styling
- Support both desktop and small-screen layouts
- Properly cleanup interval on component unmount

Verified locally with responsive viewport testing and production build.

本次 PR 将 Lobby 页面中原本写死的 “Season ends in” 文本替换为真实倒计时功能。

改动内容包括：
- 为 Lobby 页面增加实时倒计时逻辑
- 使用固定目标时间：2026-06-10T00:00:00Z
- 动态计算剩余天 / 小时 / 分钟
- 每分钟自动更新一次倒计时
- 倒计时结束后显示 “Season Ended”
- 保持当前 UI 布局与视觉风格不变
- 适配桌面端与小屏布局
- 正确 cleanup interval，避免内存泄漏

已在本地响应式 viewport 与 production build 下完成测试。
title: feat(lobby): add live season countdown timer
